examples: At least I am a moviegoer and enjoy killing time in the theater.
As a frequent moviegoer, I am keeping abreast of the latest development of Hollywood movies.
If a Chinese moviegoer wants to learn about Hayao Miyazaki-style animations, then this is the one to see.
"My friends wanted to see it so I came along, " said a female moviegoer.
Ang Lee, in his treatment of the plot, cleverly assumes the moviegoer is not homophobic.
